instructions: (Claude Code's built-in system prompt; see --bare mode docs)

queries.user_text:
You're debugging a real-codebase bug in `cpp_peglib-2` (project `cpp_peglib`, an open-source C/C++ project from the BugsC++ corpus).

The buggy source tree is on the host at `/Users/ibraheemamin/projects/COS484/chatdbgpro/data/workspaces/cpp_peglib-2/cpp_peglib/buggy-2` and is also mounted at `/work` inside a Linux/amd64 container named `bench-t4-556df90f724940ddbf3b` (gdb, the buggy binary, and all build deps live in that container; the binary is NOT runnable on this host directly).

Buggy binary inside the container: `/work/build/test/test-main`
Failing test invocation:           `./build/test/test-main  Nested macro callr`
Observed behavior:                  `exit_code:0`
Bug type:                          `memory_error`
Language:                          `cpp`

How to investigate
------------------
* To READ source code, use Read / Grep / your normal tools — the source tree is at `/Users/ibraheemamin/projects/COS484/chatdbgpro/data/workspaces/cpp_peglib-2/cpp_peglib/buggy-2` (it's been added via `--add-dir`).
* To RUN the binary, run gdb, or execute anything else inside the build environment, use Bash with this template:

      docker exec -i -w /work bench-t4-556df90f724940ddbf3b bash -c '<cmd>'

  e.g.
      docker exec -w /work bench-t4-556df90f724940ddbf3b bash -c 'ls -la'
      docker exec -w /work bench-t4-556df90f724940ddbf3b bash -c 'gdb -batch -ex run -ex bt --args ./build/test/test-main  Nested macro callr'

  The container is dedicated to this case; it'll be torn down when this session ends, so don't worry about cleanup.

Final answer
------------
Identify the root cause in the source, propose both a local fix and a structural global fix.

Your final response MUST include three labelled paragraphs:

  ROOT CAUSE: <file:line and what is wrong>
  LOCAL FIX:  <minimal code change>
  GLOBAL FIX: <structural change preventing this CLASS of bug>

Do NOT modify the source files on disk. Just investigate and produce the diagnosis as your final assistant message.

tool_calls.call: docker exec -w /work bench-t4-556df90f724940ddbf3b bash -c 'gdb -batch -ex run -ex bt --args ./build/test/test-main "Nested macro callr" 2>&1 | head -100'
docker exec -w /work bench-t4-556df90f724940ddbf3b bash -c './build/test/test-main "Nested macro callr" 2>&1'
docker exec -w /work bench-t4-556df90f724940ddbf3b bash -c './build/test/test-main "Nested macro call" 2>&1'
docker exec -w /work bench-t4-556df90f724940ddbf3b bash -c 'gdb -batch -ex "run" -ex "bt" --args ./build/test/test-main "Nested macro call" 2>&1' | head -80
docker exec -w /work bench-t4-556df90f724940ddbf3b bash -c 'valgrind --leak-check=full ./build/test/test-main "Nested macro call" 2>&1' | tail -150
docker exec -w /work bench-t4-556df90f724940ddbf3b bash -c 'nm ./build/test/test-main | grep -i asan | head -5'
docker exec -w /work bench-t4-556df90f724940ddbf3b bash -c './build/test/test-main "Nested macro call" 2>&1'
